case_title: NANCY GONZALEZ PINEDA VS. KARLA MARINA PINEDA GARCIA

REQUEST FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) AS TO RESPONDENT PINEDA GARCIA, KARLA MARINA

TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) AND COURT HEARING TO REVIEW FIREARMS (GUNS), FIREARM PARTS, AND AMMUNITION COMPLIANCE FILED BY PETITIONER GONZALEZ PINEDA, NANCY AS TO RESPONDENT PINEDA GARCIA, KARLA MARINA
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2023 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 403
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2023 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 406
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY RESPONDENT PINEDA GARCIA, KARLA MARINA

RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR DOMESTIC VIOLENCE RESTRAINING ORDER ON CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2023 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 403 FILED BY RESPONDENT PINEDA GARCIA, KARLA MARINA AS TO PETITIONER GONZALEZ PINEDA, NANCY

DOMESTIC VIOLENCE Z ON SEP-29-2023 CONTINUED TO FAMILY LAW TRIAL/ SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2023 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 406 ***THESE ARE RELATED CASES THAT HAVE AN OPEN DEPENDENCY CASE (JD23-3267, 68, 68A) IN DEPARTMENT 406. JUDGE WOODS HAS ASKED THAT IF THE PARTIES APPEAR, PLEASE TRANSFER THE CASE FORTHWITH TO DEPARTMENT 406. WE HAVE RESERVED A HEARING, SAME DAY AT 9:00AM IN DEPARTMENT 406 ON 9-29-2023.*** REQUIREMENTS OF GOVERNMENT CODE 68561 REGARDING INTERPRETER QUALIFICATIONS HAVE BEEN MET. SHANNON RAINTREE, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER IS PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM ASSISTING THE RESPONDENT. MATTER CALLED AT 10:48AM IN DEPT 406 PETITIONER WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER WITH HER SISTER YENCY GONZALEZ IN THE COURTROOM. RESPONDENT WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER WITH HIS SPOUSE, KARLA MARINA PINEDA GARCIA IN THE COURTROOM. ADDITIONAL PARTIES PRESENT WERE PETITIONER'S COUNSEL, MARGARET PENDERGAST IN THE DEPENDENCY CASE, MINOR, KIMBERLY PINEDA AND MINOR'S COUNSEL, MARIKO NAKANISHI, AND DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, MARIO VAZQUEZ. TRO IS MAINTAINED AND REMAINS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REISSUED TO BE FILED UNDER DEPENDENCY CASE MOVING FORWARD AND SET FOR HEARING ON 10-26-2023 AT 9:00AM IN DEPARTMENT 406. MINOR IS ALLOWED SUPERVISED VISITS WITH HER GRANDMOTHER UNDER THE AGENCY'S SUPERVISION. MS. PENDERGAST WILL PROVIDE THE ORDER TO THE COURT. PARTIES ARE ORDERED PRESENT.
NOTICE OF HEARING (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PETITIONER GONZALEZ PINEDA, NANCY AS TO RESPONDENT PINEDA GARCIA, KARLA MARINA HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-2023 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 403
